title: Turcademy Academic E-Book Database
content:
Turcademy Academic E-Book Database

Dear Students,

Turcademy Academic E-Book Database

, which offers access to approximately 12,000 academic and Turkish e-books, has been opened for trial access until 06.12.2024. For access, you need to create an account with your e-mail with the extension ‘@st.uskudar.edu.tr’. The access address is given below.

https://login.proxy.uskudar.edu.tr/login?url=https://www.turcademy.com

Sincerely.

Share
